confidence_rationale: This appears to be a rope cutting exercise rather than the standard FLS Task 2 pattern cutting which involves cutting a circular pattern from gauze. The setup and execution differ significantly from the official Task 2 protocol.
cannot_determine: Whether this represents the official FLS Task 2 pattern cut or a different cutting exercise
Precise deviation measurements from marked lines - no circular pattern or gauze visible
Whether gauze remains attached to clamps - no gauze or clamps visible in standard configuration
technique_summary: Efficient systematic cutting approach with good instrument control, though the exercise setup does not match standard FLS Task 2 protocol.
improvement_suggestions: Ensure exercise matches official FLS Task 2 requirements with circular pattern on suspended gauze
